user.title: HA Weather Provider
user.description: Set up The Weather Company weather data.

data_description.latitude: Use decimal degrees. North is positive, south is negative.
data_description.longitude: Use decimal degrees. East is positive, west is negative.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to The Weather Company API.
error.not_authorized: The API key is not authorized for this Weather Company endpoint.
error.invalid_coordinates: Latitude or longitude is outside the supported range.
error.invalid_units: The selected unit system is not supported.

data_description.daily_forecast_duration: The Weather Company daily forecast endpoint to request.
data_description.enable_pollen: Requests The Weather Company pollen forecast endpoint and creates pollen forecast sensors when data is available.
data_description.enable_tropical_weather: Requests The Weather Company tropical current-position endpoint and creates compact active storm summary sensors when data is available.
data_description.extra_entities: Adds companion sensors for current conditions, rolling precipitation and snow amounts, alert count, observation time, integration version, and daily forecast adapter values.
data_description.hourly_forecast_duration: The Weather Company hourly forecast endpoint to request.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often to refresh Weather Company data, in minutes.
